---
name: User Story
about: Create a user story linked to business rules and functional requirements
title: 'US-[ACTOR]-### | [Short user story title]'
labels: ['type:feature', 'status:needs-design']
assignees: []
---

## User Story
**As a** [Actor]  
**I want** [Goal]  
**So that** [Benefit]

## Source References
- **Business Rules:** BR-* (comma-separated)
- **Functional Requirements:** FR-* (comma-separated)
- **User Story ID:** US-*-###

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Technical Notes
- Affected modules: (e.g., module:series, module:auth)
- Database tables involved: (e.g., Series, SeriesContributor)
- API endpoints: (if applicable)

## Dependencies
- Blocked by: (link issues if applicable)
- Blocks: (link downstream issues)

## AI Assistance Notes
- AI involvement: (advisory / disabled / none)
- If advisory: Human review required before workflow use

## Checklist
- [ ] Traceability confirmed (BR/FR/US links present)
- [ ] No future-scope creep (MVP scope validated)
- [ ] Actor role defined
- [ ] Acceptance criteria clear
